programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy

programme.desc: Dressed as Alice in Wonderland for a local children's play, Shirley ends up going to the hospital instead to get her appendix out. Her fear causes her to run and hide, so the gang must find her before her appendix fails her for good.

programme.desc: Two FBI agents use the girls' apartment to stake out criminal activity across the street. When the suspect gets outside their window the girls are shocked to see Carmine with him. Has Carmine gone bad or is there another explanation?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley get reacquainted with Ms. Babish's mentally challenged daughter, Amy, who's visiting from her special school. Lenny meets Amy and immediately comes to like her, despite people's protests about what's best for Amy.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: It's New Years Eve 1959 and 1960 is shortly due. In the final hours, Laverne's date cancels, Shirley's sick, and Lenny and Squiggy have a special plan for midnight outside the apartment building. Will Laverne leave the '50s in tears or cheers?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley rescues a white horse. The owner wants to send it to the glue factory, but Shirley seeks him a happy home. She gets Edna in trouble with a health inspector for having him in the apartment. Will it be greener pastures for Buttercup?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne busts a tooth but won't see a dentist. Shirley suggests her student dentist cousin Mikey. Laverne's hates the idea. Mikey has flunked before. Shirley gets her okay but once in the chair will Laverne truly feel safe in Mikey's hands?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Traveling to another city by bus for a blind date, the girls end up being ditched by two medical students who don't find them attractive - leaving the girls stranded overnight with no way home for over 12 hours.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne attends a Debutante Ball with Lenny when it's found out he's 89th in line to be a duke on the Polish throne.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The only date - a blind one at that - Shirley finds to make Carmine jealous, is with a former classmate known as Eraserhead (an already balding, chubby, and weird guy). Is it really worth it to get even with Carmine for dating another?

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Members of the Happy Days gang find themselves transformed into Pilgrims when Marion dreams of reviving the true spirit of Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork decides to become a priest.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork foolishly picks a fight with Mindy in order to "kiss and make up.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and Mindy compete to earn a job working for Nelson.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork instills human emotions in a robot.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Kathy drags Mork home for an evening and later announces that she's pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, and Edna travel to New York to visit Frank's mother and attend a street festival; they are joined there by Lenny and Squiggy (who hitchhiked).

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou comes back from Dubai to spend time with the family. Ty and Amy discover where her father's rustled cattle are being pastured and the whole family rides out to bring them back.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty's travel buddies, Grant and Blair, return to Heartland, and Ty and Amy's relationship is put in jeopardy. Caleb and Ashley's relationship is in turmoil after finding out their marriage is not legal.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim decides to enter Lightning Dexter in a claiming race, despite Amy's objections. Amy and Ty's troubles are aggravated when Chase comes to town and offers to put in a bid on Dexter.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack resists taking a trip to France with Lisa while dealing with some old memories. Caleb asks Ty to be his best man but finds it harder to ask him to move out.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy finds herself overwhelmed after promising to de-sensitize three horses for the local police. Amy returns the last of Ty's things and he continues down his road of confusion.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When famous Olympic trainer Stewart Forrest hires Amy to coach his Olympic hopeful daughter, Amy feels that he's pushing her and her horse too hard. Ty is concerned when Amy asks Chase for help again.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Bad publicity from Stewart Forrest's lawsuit against Amy has everyone at Heartland concerned. When Chase pulls his horses from training, Ty lends Amy his support and Lou does a little investigating.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Caleb's rodeo buddy Bryce returns from Afghanistan in a wheelchair and asks Amy to get his horse back into good condition so that he can sell it, but Amy would rather convince him to try riding again.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim and his girlfriend announce they are selling the ranch and moving to California, but one of Tim's old girlfriends comes back and claims that Tim is the father of her son.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work through their trust issues as they train a pair of Clydesdales. A horse-crazed boy and his mom show up at Heartland and Tim learns about a son he never knew he had.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy meets a professional liberty horse trainer and is inspired to take her horsemanship to a new level. A leaky roof forces Amy and Ty to move into Ashley and Caleb's trailer.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack shanghais Tim, taking him to Moosejaw to confront his ex-girlfriend and son. Meanwhile, Amy is left to confront Janice about how to train the new racehorse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Peter and Lou bring the baby back to Heartland and invite the in-laws to the naming ceremony. Scott drops by Ty's new place with a motorcycle requiring some work.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy works with a chuckwagon horse and discovers an impediment that could put the entire team in danger, so she changes the dynamics of a prominent chuckwagon family.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del estreno de la temporada, dieciséis concursantes tienen la oportunidad de alcanzar el estrellato culinario y un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en la ciudad turística canadiense de Whistler, Columbia Británica.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del estreno de temporada, vuelve un competidor de la quinta temporada y los quince cocineros restantes se preparan para una cena marinera.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes deben crear comidas de tres platos que sumen solo 700 calorías. Los ganadores fueron a la playa con la jugadora de voleibol de playa Annett Davis.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Spell at the Waterfall
programme.desc: Egalt teaches the Rising Dragon to the ninja; Sora and Riyu learn Spinjitzu from Rontu; Cole reaches the Monastery with the Finders and sets off on an adventure with Zane.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter – New Beginning Special

programme.title: Friends: Girls on a Mission - (Special)
programme.desc: After a disagreement, the five friends get trapped in Andrea's old house and are reminded of the importance of friendship and the holiday spirit.

programme.title: Hidden Side: Night of the Harbinger (Halloween)
programme.desc: Our kids work to seal a Hidden Side hole when a fire ghost escapes covered in a strange silvery substance that reveals their world may be doomed.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous "Cubby the Cop" balloon on the city. Fire Chief McCloud accidentally buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine, the devastatingly sexy lady thief who'll stop at nothing to make her steal, has her sights set on a religious cult's secret treasure when a new man waltzes into her life: Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A war is going down between the Italian and Chinese Mafias, and Fujiko ends up in the middle of it. A mysterious bodyguard named Daisuke Jigen stands at the heart of the matter, but who knows whose side he's really on?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: She's always getting in trouble / But she may give you a square deal / She's always sharing everything / Except for every steal / Even a lowly samurai / Is quick to see the appeal / How do you solve a problem like Fujiko Mine?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: The famous diva Aiyan's bejeweled mask has been targeted by Lupin the Third, and Zenigata determines to "set a thief to catch a thief." Who will get to the mask first: Fujiko or Lupin?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Using her womanly wiles, Fujiko convinces Lupin to retrieve the legendary Laughing Peacock from an Egyptian pyramid. However, the seemingly simple job turns into a fierce race when Jigen sets his sights on the treasure too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Fujiko infiltrates a Catholic girls' school and sets about stealing all the maidens' hearts to pave the way for an even bigger theft. But Oscar knows exactly what she's up to, and he's got a plan to stop her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: The nation of Carib is in political upheaval, and Fujiko is in the thick of the action, naturally. What is she doing posing as a reporter? Will revolutionary Philadel Kest win her heart where Lupin has failed? And what is Goemon doing on that fighter jet?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A fortune-teller supposedly able to predict his clients' deaths is for some reason seeking out Lupin's prior victims and giving them some very disturbing readings. What's the connection to Fujiko Mine, and how far will she go to see this job through?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Magical realism plus human trafficking plus Lupin and Daisuke Jigen plus a spa vacation plus Fujiko off the deep end equals... Well, you'll just have to find out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Count Almeida has a job for Lupin, and he's not about to take no for an answer. When Lupin and Zenigata both separately make their way to the Count's villa seeking answers, the trail of clues leads to a ghost town with just one inhabitant.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A recent string of particularly flashy thefts has been tied to Fujiko Mine, who seems to have taken to sending written warnings to the police just like Lupin does. But if you ask Inspector Zenigata, something smells fishy about the whole thing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Oscar's body is missing, girls are being kidnapped all over the world, and Lupin still hasn't made good on his threat to steal Fujiko Mine. There's only one thing to do: It's time to pay a visit to one Count Luís Yu Almeida.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: In the season finale, all the players have finally come together, and it's time to see how the tale ends.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Hemingway Papers
programme.desc: The legendary last manuscript of the great Ernest Hemingway tells of a buried treasure on an island far away… and thief extraordinaire Lupin is on the trail! But he gets caught up in a local civil war, Lupin will have to keep his wits or risk his life!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Napoleon's Dictionary
programme.desc: Lupin learns of his grandfather's secret treasure, supposedly hidden in the pages of a dictionary previously owned by Napoleon Bonaparte! Said dictionary just happens to be the prize in a cross-country classic car race.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Ryan y su equipo prestan asistencia paranormal a una familia que vive en una casa histórica que una vez fue parte del ferrocarril subterráneo.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Estado paranormal visita un cementerio gótico, donde un espíritu celoso parece acechar a la esposa recién casada del cuidador del cementerio. Ryan rastrea el fenómeno hasta una misteriosa urna de cremación no reclamada en el terreno.

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción
programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: historietas de terror, Louie el ladrón, el gemido, la casera, maldición.

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción
programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: por el expediente, Halloween, preciosa, venganza en el motel 66, vagabundo fantasma.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños son vitales. Palpitan en nuestros corazones, resuenan en nuestras mentes, nos impulsan hacia adelante hasta que convertimos nuestra imaginación en acción y damos aliento a nuestros destinos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: En la cima del monte Kenia las temperaturas oscilan entre más de 30° C y por debajo de cero. Las plantas y los animales han evolucionado milagrosamente para sobrevivir en situaciones hostiles.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Dos de los carnívoros más poderosos de África impactan uno con otro en la sabana. Leones y hienas deben matar casi todos los días para mantener a grandes familias.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Descubra Londres, un centro cosmopolita con una gran influencia en el mundo de las finanzas, las artes y la moda, y una ciudad cargada de historia.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Jerusalén es una ciudad santa para judíos, cristianos y musulmanes, y cada uno tiene su piedra sagrada aquí: el Muro de los Lamentos, la Piedra del Santo Sepulcro y la Roca debajo de la famosa cúpula de oro.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Desde el comportamiento en sus manadas, pasando por esconderse a simple vista, hasta construir sólidas fortificaciones, los animales pueden defenderse sabiamente.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Algunos animales no se detendrán ante nada para ganar su territorio, y aquellos que lo tienen, lucharán ferozmente para defenderlo.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: With Rock Lee there to take on Kimimaro, Naruto is free to chase after Sasuke, who has awakened.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Shikamaru, Kiba and Lee are at the limits of their strength when Gaara, Temari and Kankuro appear to assist their Leaf allies.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kimimaro realizes that close combat is impossible against Gaara’s wall of sand, so he moves further away for a long-distance attack.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kimimaro succeeds in shattering Gaara’s protective sand shield and attacks Gaara. Naruto finally catches up to Sasuke…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: With the Curse Mark covering half his body, Sasuke is no longer the Sasuke of old. Naruto charges at this new Sasuke who has turned his back on his closest comrades.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto tries desperately to change Sasuke’s mind, but Sasuke is determined to go to Orochimaru. He tells Naruto that in order to surpass his brother, Itachi, power and hatred are necessary.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto is brought down by Sasuke’s Fire Style: Fireball Jutsu. It is a jutsu passed down through generations of the Uchiha family…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sasuke quietly watches as Naruto sinks deeper in the water. He recalls the past when the Uchiha clan was cruelly slaughtered.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kakashi uses his Summoning Jutsu and sends ninja dogs to track Naruto and Sasuke. With his newfound strength, Sasuke is serious about bringing down Naruto…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto releases his Nine-Tail chakra and sends Sasuke flying. Sasuke counters with his Fire Style Jutsu, but Naruto extinguishes the flames easily.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto’s Nine-Tail chakra seems to move with a will of its own as it counters Sasuke’s powerful attacks.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The fierce battle with Sasuke leaves Naruto unconscious. Kakashi finally arrives at his side.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sakura tries to sneak out of the village to find Sasuke, but Naruto intercepts her.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto, Sakura and Jiraiya search for information in a town in the Land of Rice Paddies.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto, Sakura and Sasame are attacked by Kamikiri, Jigumo and Kagero of the Fuma Clan.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Jiraiya uses his Summoning Jutsu to call out Gamakichi. With Gamakichi leading the way, the shinobi advance up winding stairways and through long tunnels.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sakura is cornered by Orochimaru! Just as Kabuto is about to hurl his kunai at her, Naruto comes running in.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto tries to shield Sakura from an attack and is wounded by Kamikiri. Naruto laughs off his injury and counters with his Shadow Clone Jutsu…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto gets upset when Jiraiya sets out on a sudden mission without him. Jiraiya tells him to undergo special training during his absence and hands him a scroll.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Shizune pursues Mizuki who has escaped from the Maximum Security Prison but is overcome by him and the brothers Raijin and Fujin.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Raijin and Fujin possess superhuman strength, and Naruto is no match for them.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Shikamaru, Ino and Choji come to the rescue. The three have been sent by Tsunade to assist, allowing Naruto and Pakkun to go after Mizuki.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto discovers that Tsubaki is Mizuki’s fiancée. She has an idea of his whereabouts and asks the squad to take her with them.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto and Iruka are left in a daze by the power of Mizuki’s chakra. Naruto counters with a Jutsu but is quickly rebuffed.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kiba, Shino and Hinata have come up with an idea to use the Bikochu beetle to find Sasuke.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Squad 8 and Naruto arrive at the Bikochu’s habitat. They use a photograph to guide them in their search…

programme.title: Naruto

programme.desc: Lincoln quiere el sofá para ver su programa favorito, pero sus hermanas no le dejan; Lincoln le deja un mensaje a Lori en su correo de voz, pero se arrepiente enseguida y busca la manera de eliminarlo antes de que Lori lo escuche.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln está cansado de que sus hermanas se entrometan en su vida, pero su opinión cambia cuando se burlan de él en la escuela; Lincoln graba los momentos más embarazosos de sus hermanas.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker crea clones de Cosmo y Wanda para entrar a la convención de padrinos y robar toda la magia. Timmy desea que Chloe pueda vivir en su película distópica favorita, pero se arrepiente cuando ve que todos están hambrientos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe cumplen su objetivo, que sus familias acampen juntas, pero sus padres se pelean; Chloe desea ser mamá para poder asistir a un evento con Timmy.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe ayudan a Gatoman a demostrarle a su novia que es un superhéroe real; el Sr. Crocker le enseña a su sobrino, Kevin Crocker, a cazar de padrinos mágicos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Los Squirrley Scouts van al espacio para colocar una bandera en un terreno desconocido, con la esperanza de lograr un lugar especial de los Squirrely Scouts; Chloe pasa las vacaciones de verano estudiando, pero su niño interior no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: A pesar de las advertencias de Timmy, Chloe quiere liberar a la liebre de la clase; cuando el papá de Timmy compra la última Kale Patch Kid, Chloe quiere completar su colección robándola.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe se transforman en sirenas y salvan la ciudad sumergida de la Atlántida de un peligrosísimo monstruo marino; Chloe se convierte en vigilante de pasillos en la escuela, pero surgen problemas porque se toma el cargo demasiado en serio.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: La Sra. Crocker deja al Sr. Crocker en casa solo por primera vez, y llama a Timmy para que le enseñe cómo divertirse; Chloe quiere romper el récord de asistencia, pero Timmy le dice que su escuela está suspendida y la lleva a un puesto de tacos.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.desc: Tony explores Naples on a quest to define true Italian food and culture.

programme.desc: Tony tours the alluring French gastronomic region of Brittany.

programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain's Japanese trip begins in Osaka at an underground bar.

programme.desc: In Sydney, Tony experiences enviable food and drink in the land down under.

programme.desc: Tony visits the Philippines and samples some of their rare delicacies.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain heads north to Maine for fresh seafood and more.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: At 13 years old, Meghan had issues with alcohol and is now into harder drugs. Then, Raven claims she lost her virginity to Joe and hasn't slept with anyone else, but Joe has heard rumors that he's not the only person she slept with.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steven wants to prove to his wife Stephanie that he is not gay and has never cheated on her with a man. Then, Tiaha doubts Jamal's fidelity because he stays out late and is distant. What shocking truths will their lie detector tests reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Melody believes her boyfriend Glenn hired Marra to wash cars in a bikini and sleep with him. Glenn suspects Melody hasn't been faithful too. Plus, Dani isn't sure if her boyfriend Robert slept with her sister.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tonya wants to tell her man that she's pregnant and cheating with her transsexual roommate, Gina! Mike has been sleeping with his fiancé’s cousin for a year! Then, Jimmy has a pregnant fiancé AND girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The truth comes out on today's Jerry Springer Show! Michelle tells her lover David that she's really a man. Speedy fights to win his ex-girlfriend back from her new lover Tom.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mehren says everything would be just great with her boyfriend, John, if only his wife would leave them alone! Greg is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend, Yolanda!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jake slept with his brother Joe’s fiancé. Then, Danny claims he’s leaving his fiancé Heather for a professional escort named Chelsi. Plus more stories of wild nuptials.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Donna, who weighs 600 pounds, is desperate to lose weight and confronts her blind husband and angry kids about whether or not they’re responsible for her health.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whoever made the saying "you can't have your cake and eat it too" must have been going to the wrong bakery. Our guests are here to get what they want and aren't scared of who they have to run over to get it.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Teen Daughter's Fiance A Cheater?
programme.desc: If Mayyadah’s husband’s lie detector test proves that he’s having sex through online chat rooms, then they’re getting a divorce! Will Debbie kick fiancée Pablo out over cheating suspicions?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Eddie’s mom Grace won’t let them live with her unless Kay Kay can prove that her son Eddie fathered her grandchild. Then, Troy denies that he’s the father of all 5 of Vanessa’s babies. But when the results arrive, will he be proven wrong or right?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Teen mom Casie is dead set on proving Casey is the dad. Is Dirk the father of Brooke’s baby? Which brother fathered Miranda’s baby? Brandon denies both of Me'Chelle's kids but even his mother is on Me'Chelle's side!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today it's all about Ashlee! Lucky refuses to believe that his son Dechonne is the father of Ashlee's baby. Dechonne doesn't know who to believe! Then, Ashlee thinks her neighbor Jason is the father, but Jason's sister says she's wrong!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree's worried about the rumors that her man is sleeping with her sister. But will these sisters really battle for Cruz's love? Will Bryant take back Jalissa after she cheated?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shianne comes clean about cheating on Mistress Delicious with her mom Blonde. Then, Chris’ baby’s mother confronts him about leaving her for their threesome partner!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John is cheating on his wife Destinee with Cici, but Cici's got some secrets too. Then, Lala drops a bombshell on her man. Plus Michael and his wife Tayliana both have secrets to reveal to each other.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Josh y Amy descubrirán hoy que sus parejas han sido infieles. Después Madeline le contará a Andre que ha estado acostándose con Diante. Después, Quincy está comprometido con Callie pero ella no sabe que Quincy ha sido infiel con Amy.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen le contará a John que lo va a dejar por su amante secreto, Jerry, de 73 años. Después, Danika tiene una sorpresita para su prometido y se siente obligada a decirle que ella realmente es un hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John pesa casi 700 libras y no podría ser más feliz. Su novia Kim le hace elegir entre ella y un sándwich de 3 metros de largo. Él elige el sándwich.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Carla ha estado siendo infiel a su novio con su mejor amigo y su hermana! Después, Yvonne le contará a su amiga Marie que ha tenido relaciones sexuales con su novio. Mary Sue y su amante secreto, Cory, han venido a confrontar al novio de Mary Sue, Scott.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Jamie le ha sido infiel a su novio con una mujer! Después, Steve cree que su esposa ha sido infiel con otro hombre. A continuación, LaToya viene a causar un conflicto familiar. ¡Ella ha estado siendo infiel con la hermana de su novia!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jennifer se niega a dejar ir a su ex-novio, Marcus. Dice que lo recuperará a toda costa. Luego, Eddie dejó a Glinda y a su hijo de dos años hace 16 años. Hoy, Glinda le dice a Eddie que quiere que vuelva.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelo está aquí para contarle a su novia que es mujer. Luego, Mikey ha traído a su novia para contarle que le ha sido infiel. Después, Jennifer siente que debe decirle a su amante la verdad sobre su sexualidad

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le reclama a Rosaura por haber salido con Bruno, pero al final le dice que puede hacerlo porque él confía en ella. Eva le da dos cachetadas a Gabriel porque la besó.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel la necesidad que tiene de alejarse para siempre de Rosaura para no seguir haciéndole daño porque sabe que no la ama y nunca podrá.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando Rosaura llega al aeropuerto ve a Eva besando a Luis Mario y termina desmayándose en el camino, mientras que Bruno corre como loco por todo el lugar buscándola.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda, ayudada por Panchita, busca el collar de perlas negras con el cual piensa enviar presa a Rosaura, mientras que Luis Mario le escribe una carta a Rosaura, en la cual vuelve a pedirle perdón.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se niega a considerar la posibilidad de que Rosaura esté esperando un hijo suyo, como le sugiere Gabriel.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda le pide al comisario que le permita ver a Rosaura y cuando está frente a ella la obliga a arrodillarse en su presencia, diciéndole que de esa forma retirará su denuncia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva esperan que salga Anselmo y lo atropellan con su carro, riendo se alejan de allí. En la cárcel Rosaura se despierta aterrada por una pesadilla, llamando a su padre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le dice a su hermano Iván que está llena de odio y que cree que en la muerte de su madre tiene algo que ver Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: El amigo de Camelia, el Dr. Diego Montoro, llama a Luis Mario y le informa que tiene que hablar urgentemente con él. Patricio se despierta y comienza a llamar a Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Diego le cuenta a Camelia que Luis Mario en su ausencia se había casado con otra mujer. Samuel le pregunta a Griselda como es la sirvienta nueva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario sale del carro y busca a Rosaura. Luisana toma la pistola y dice que con ella si podría matar definitivamente a Camelia, ya que ella no hará feliz a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia presiona a Eva para que le diga si efectivamente Luis Mario se enamoró de Rosaura, pero ella no se lo confirma y en cambio la amenaza con hacerle saber a Luis Mario el secreto de su vida.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia abraza a Luis Mario y le exige que vuelvan a ser la pareja feliz de antes, ya que ella lo quiere recuperar. Karina se fastidia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva discuten por Rosaura, cuando llega Luisana. Eva descarga su mal humor con ella y cuando Luis Mario se aleja, la amenaza con botarla de la casa por Eduarda y Camelia.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Captain Smoker has Luffy in his grasp until a fiery stranger creates a diversion, giving the Straw Hats a chance to make a break for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Luffy’s happy reunion is crudely interrupted by the Billions of Baroque Works. They may be outnumbered, but these brothers are no ordinary pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Before they can start their trek across the desert, Luffy and the Straw Hats are stopped at the shore by the cute – but formidable – Kung Fu Dugongs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s crew encounters treacherous birds and man-eating foliage on its desert odyssey, and just when they think the coast is clear, a great disturbance emerges from beneath the sand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats cross paths with the Barbar Sand Pirates, and Ace runs into big trouble when he gets separated from the group.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Princess Vivi devises a plan to test the hearts of a gang of so-called rebels. They talk a good game, but will their bite measure up to their bark?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue their journey to Yuba, where a bittersweet reunion with a childhood friend awaits Princess Vivi.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire Fist Ace is hired by two young boys to hunt down and capture a lethal bounty hunter known only as the Scorpion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Zoro, and Luffy get separated from the others. When the heat makes Luffy act even stranger than usual, his friends wonder if they joined the right pirate gang.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The assassins of Baroque Works gather at Spider’s Café, and the Straw Hats arrive at Yuba only to find it buried in sand.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile reveals himself to the Baroque Works assassins and discloses his dastardly plan for Alabasta. After departing Yuba, Luffy takes a stand that forces Vivi to rethink her mission.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only

programme.title: Licence to Kill

programme.title: Dive to Tiger Central

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries

programme.title: Chasing Monsters

programme.title: Nomads of the Serengeti

programme.title: Wild Animal Orphans
programme.desc: A caracal with a broken leg arrives needing immediate medical attention. Then, when a cheetah owner breaks a leg, Marlice swoops in to save the day.

programme.title: Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: When Jack Frost blankets the landscape there is magic in the air.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: Pegleg sets off in search of his friend Derek, lost after the forest fire. Meanwhile, the troop encounters an unusually speedy tortoise and Hogarth has a run-in with a flycatcher.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote attempts to pickup and hold one of the spiniest creatures on the planet: the echidna!

programme.title: Get Wild
programme.desc: Learning about porcupines, leopards and macaws.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Arctic Circle
programme.desc: Bear Grylls heads for the icy wastes of the Arctic Circle, where he tackles a frozen waterfall, hunts wild reindeer and battles against some of the coldest conditions on the planet.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Extreme isolation takes its toll on the remaining participants in the wild. Each man's battle turns to the mind as well as the elements.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Two men remain on Vancouver Island as the storm of the year blows in.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The cast of Alone Season 2 reunites for the first time since leaving Vancouver Island to watch and discuss the 10 most talked-about moments of the series posted on social media.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Meet the 10 new participants on Alone Season 2 and see what it takes to make the cut. From exhaustive skills tests to camera and safety training.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: An ordinary Friday at the Seattle headquarters of the Jewish Federation turns nightmarish when a crazed gunman demands an end to the war in Iraq and shoots four workers.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A single mother is kidnapped, stabbed and left for dead by three hardened criminals and her heroic survival is unforgettable.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: After five ruthless hijackers take control of an EgyptAir flight and begin executing passengers, a woman silently says goodbye to her loved ones.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The men return to Beringovsky to make repairs to their fuel systems. Russian locals warn of poor fuel causing problems. The expedition decides to keep going!

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: An expedition of five men on four watercraft make an ambitious attempt to travel from Seattle Washington, though the Canadian inside passage, the Alaskan inside passage, into the Bering Sea and cross the Bering Strait to Russia.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Winter trapping requires different skills than trapping in the spring. Laramy pulls out all the tricks to trap for critters.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy hunts the steep climbs of Idaho for mountain whitetail. Hunting these mountains in the old way makes for a tremendous challenge.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: A real outdoorsman uses every part of the kill, and Laramy shows us why skinning and tanning is such an important part of the mountain man life.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy shows us how the Mountain Men hunted in the 1800s, where unusal skills and stalking techniques were needed not only to succeed in the hunt, but to survive the harsh winters.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: While exploring the Australian Outback, the team stumbles upon a large, snake-like lizard!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote heads out for a safari adventure in South Africa at the Kariega Game Reserve.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote discovers some dung beetles battling. You won't believe what the winning prize is!

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods
programme.desc: To appease a client, Steve makes a big-rig rat rod out of a '79 Peterbilt.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods
programme.desc: Steve faces an uphill battle meeting demands for a 1930s era truck.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan reluctantly goes down the Caddy customization wormhole on a personal project, and everyone at the shop is happy to watch him go, just to see how great it turns out.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Shannon recruits the guys to help him finish up a gift for Danny - a bike he started building for him ten years ago. Danny spots a 1969 Corvette in a friend's lot and he can't resist paying a visit.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny charges Ryan with customizing a new Chevy Silverado for their most difficult customer--himself! Danny wants it to maintain the flavor of his old '56 truck, but wants more comfort and reliability.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The team is commissioned to build a bike for a military veteran. He wants to show his love for family and country by covering the bike with American flags and portraits of loved ones who also served.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: When Tommy Lee's beloved bike gets crushed in an accident, he turns to the only person he trusts to fix it--the guys who built it--Count's Kustoms.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour junk car endurance race. Meanwhile Danny has the guys work on a one of a kind special shop project as payback for his sponsorship.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the junk car race which they resurrect as the "Count's Bloody Mess." At the race, they realize first place may not be an option, but hope that "Count's Bloody Mess" will finish in one piece.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Twisted Sister's Dee Snider brings the crew a brand new BMW Z4 that he wants Count-ified for his wife Suzette as an anniversary present. A simple paint job turns disaster when Suzette is not happy with the final look, not once, but twice.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin's brother Steve wants a 1980 Kawasaki KZ100 motorcycle tricked out just like the ones on the classic TV series, CHiPs.

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: FBI

programme.desc: The manager of a small-time UHF station which has the lowest ratings in the country inadvertently hits it big with his strange programming ideas to keep Channel 62 from going down the tubes.

programme.title: Bio-Dome
programme.desc: In this outrageous Comedy, five brave scientists are forced to face life forms more perplexing, more terrifying, more annoying than anything they've ever encountered: Pauly Shore and Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: I'm Gonna Git You Sucka

programme.title: Blow Out

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: On certain evenings, the constellation of Lyra is visible in the skies.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Theseus was the fruit of dual paternity: Aegeus King of Athens slept with Aethra when she had just been raped by Poseidon, God of the Sea.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Taking revenge against Prometheus, Zeus created the first woman - the beautiful Pandora. He gave her a manipulative and deceptive character and subjected Prometheus to terrible torture.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Although they were the son and daughter of Zeus, Apollo and his twin sister Artemis were born under threats from the goddess Hera.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Zeus had a reputation for being a seducer of women. One day he lay with a mortal - Semele, the daughter of the king of Thebes. Their son Dionysus was brought up by nymphs.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Dedalus, a prominent Greek inventor, settled in Crete among King Minos’ court. Queen Pasiphaë, who had an all-consuming passion for a white bull, called upon his services.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Goddess of War Athena was the wisest, most level-headed and rational deity. She was born out of Zeus’ skull, wearing a helmet and holding a spear.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Kronos revolted against his father Uranus. He severed his father’s genitals and threw them into the sea, where they mingled with the foam and gave birth to Aphrodite.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Hermes was the youngest of the Gods of Olympus. Right from birth, he was an insolent, thieving, trickster God.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: In this myth, many versions of which have been passed down through the ages, Psyche is the Beauty.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Bellerophon, the grandson of Sisyphus, one of the Greek world’s worst criminals, dreamt of becoming a hero, of being equal to the Gods.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Perseus was not meant to come into the world. Fearing the fulfillment of the prediction according to which his grandson would kill him, King Acrisius shut his daughter Danaë away in a fortified tower.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: On his quest to find the Golden Fleece, Jason asked the cruel King of Colchis and his daughter Medea, a powerful sorceress, for help.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: We all know about Heracles’ unequaled strength and the twelve labors he had to carry out, but we know a great deal less about the way in which his life was turned upside down by terrible curses.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: No mortal endured more terrible a tragedy than Oedipus. He was the son of King Laius, King of Thebes.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Antigone was one of Oedipus’ four children. She had two brothers, Eteocles and Polynices, as well as a sister, Ismene.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Located in the bowels of the Earth, Tartarus was the prison of the Underworld, the place where fallen Gods and banished heroes ended up.

programme.title: Did Robin Hood Really Exist?
programme.desc: An iconic outlaw of English history, Robin Hood is one of the most legendary figures of English cultural history from his 15th-century roots. Stealing from the rich and giving to the poor, he has been a symbol of noble bravery.

programme.title: Vikings - The Lost Realm
programme.desc: The skeletons of an old lady and a younger woman found in a burial mound. Does the evidence point to a ritual sacrifice or a high-status funeral? Were they a Queen and her daughter?

programme.title: Vikings - The Lost Realm
programme.desc: What can the newest theories about the mysterious rune stones discovered at Jutland tell Tim and the team? Do they reveal that a humble village was once the Royal centre of Viking Denmark?

programme.title: Vikings - The Lost Realm
programme.desc: A quarry full of decapitated skeletons. Evidence of a mass execution. How did 54 Viking raiders meet their gruesome end? The English did not warmly welcome their Viking visitors.

programme.title: Vikings - The Lost Realm
programme.desc: Two buried Viking Age ships were uncovered at Salme, Estonia, between 2008 and 2012. Dated to around AD 750, these are the earliest known Viking ships to have crossed the Baltic.

programme.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
programme.desc: In this classic of the horror film genre, a hideously scarred pedophile who was murdered by a lynch mob returns years later in the nightmares of his killers' teenaged children … And the dreaming teenagers are starting to die in their sleep.

programme.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street 2: Freddy's Revenge
programme.desc: When Jesse Walsh moves to Elm Street, Freddy Krueger starts appearing in his nightmares. Freddy takes possession of Jesse's body whenever the teenager falls asleep, using Jesse to kill … and there's nothing Jesse can do to stop him.

programme.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street 3: The Dream Warriors

programme.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street 4: The Dream Master
programme.desc: Freddy Kreuger (Robert Englund) resurrects—hideously scarred—and returns to haunt the dreams of the teenaged children of the people who lynched him. It's just a nightmare … but a nightmare that can kill in this tale of terror.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.desc: A rocket fuel crew works to repair a fuel tank puncture on a nuclear warhead that’s 600 times more powerful than the Hiroshima bomb.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Although she has two loving children and an adoring husband, Danielle is dangerously addicted to Percocet. As a teen, Danielle felt neglected by her alcoholic father and began cutting herself.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: This follow-up episode features former subjects Chad and Brooke as they rediscover their lives during and after treatment.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Chris Schaffer has not been seen or heard from in five days. Finally, his friends find him dead and decomposed in the driver’s seat of his van.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Learn more about the Nazis and their heavily organized plunder of these riches that would ultimately become the most gigantic heist in history.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Learn about the code breaking and stealing that took place during the longest and most crucial water battle in WWII between Germany and the Allies.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The Sitzkrieg or 'Phony War' of World War II. After Hitler's invasion of Poland, neither the Allies nor the Axis engaged in war for seven months.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: June 1940. England fights alone against aggressive brutal attacks. The Germans have yet to be stopped in their lightning plunge across Europe.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: This episode explores how obtaining top-secret plans for rockets, jets and missiles was the priority for spies on both sides during WWII.

programme.desc: After Nazi Germany's invasion and capture of France, French citizens take it upon themselves to wage a guerrilla campaign against their occupiers.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Learn about the classified mission to rescue an American hostage and the manhunt for a dictator. The surprise invasion of Panama in December of 1989.

programme.desc: With visionaries, politicians, and activists, these metropolises are defined as the official seats of government. Dublin, Washington, and Taipei share broad avenues, museums, and monuments, but are as varied as the countries they represent.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: In construction, only a few buildings can be groundbreaking. Vastly different in shape, size, and function, these diverse buildings prove there is no recipe for greatness, just the fundamental ingredients of vision, bravery, and imagination.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: This episode of The Travel Bug sees Morgan in the Pacific paradise of the Solomon Islands. It’s the first part of a two week exploration of a place that’s packed with history, adventure, pristine beaches, and fascinating culture.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: Morgan continues his way through Japan, exploring some of the history and culture that makes this one of the most fascinating places on the planet. Here, he visits the stunning Kenrouken Garden and Samurai area of Kanazawa before heading to Osaka.

programme.title: The Travel Bug

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World
programme.desc: From the serene beauty of one man's love poem to a woman, the Taj Mahal, to the crowded alleys of downtown New Delhi, India is a feast for the senses.

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa

programme.desc: The buyers return to the classic Texas town of Fort Worth, where Victor seeks an ally in his bidding battle against Ricky and Bubba, who have their eyes on a coveted plasma cutter. Jenny finds an antique worthy of scientific examination.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: In search of old furniture and new territory, the buyers travel east to the border town of Texarkana. Slick Vic goes silent and stealthy to acquire a unit with action figures.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor se escapa y finge ser un cliente de lavandería. Los planes de la fiesta se cancelan cuando un joven educado es detenido. Una mujer está angustiada porque el exnovio no la deja entrar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso en propiedad privada hace preguntas en lugar de responderlas. Los policías descubren una gran cantidad de contrabando durante un retén. Un adicto viene a visitar y la policía ayuda.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre desnudo y delirante está en el porche de su vecino. Un conductor trata de correr, pero deja los zapatos atrás. Una pareja tiene dificultad en seguir adelante después de un evento trágico.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una familia llama a la policía porque hay un extraño en su casa. La policía encuentra cosas desagradables en el coche del hijo de una señora. Las tensiones entre un joven y su padrastro llegan a su límite.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: El escuadrón de rescate y urgencias médicas acude a un derrumbe producto de una explosión. La Policía detiene a dos narco-menudistas. Una mujer quemada es trasladada por el Grupo Cóndor. Una alcaldía entera busca a un niño desaparecido.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: La Policía detiene a dos narcomenudistas en una moto robada. El escuadrón ERUM asiste a una joven que intentó suicidarse y a un hombre atropellado. La policía ayuda a un joven que está cortando el tránsito.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamerica (LAS)
programme.desc: La policía peruana descubre un laboratorio narco selva amazónica. Mientras que en la frontera de Brasil y Paraguay, los agentes deben controlar a un furioso hombre que intenta ingresa con documentación sospechosa.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamerica (LAS)
programme.desc: Un contrabandista intenta darse a la fuga en la frontera brasileña y termina colisionando su automóvil contra un móvil policial. Mientras que al caer la noche, los agentes aduaneros sorprenden a cambistas ilegales en la frontera de Ipiales.

programme.title: ¡ALTO! Frontera
programme.desc: En Perú una mujer transporta droga en avena y gelatinas. Persecuciones y actividades ilegales en México y Chile. Contrabando de electrónicos en Brasil. Un hombre intenta pasar droga ingerida en su cuerpo por el aeropuerto de Bogotá.

programme.title: ¡ALTO! Frontera
programme.desc: Un vehículo robado se da a la fuga en México. Una pareja intenta pasar con droga escondida en paquetes de café. Los oficiales de Brasil luchan contra las falsificaciones de indumentaria deportiva, mientras en Perú son los documentos los falsificados.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El nuevo jefe de policía supervisa una serie de compras de drogas encubiertas en la ciudad. Los oficiales arrestan a un borracho que no para de hablar. Una sospechosa de abuso doméstico acepta que le pegó a su marido tras una discusión por dinero.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Agentes se ven obligados a utilizar la pistola eléctrica contra una persona suicida. Los policías reconocen a un sospechoso, y lo persiguen por el campo. Un sospechoso intenta esconderse de la policía en una casa abandonada.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Tres hombres intentan convencen a los policías que su carro no es robado. Los oficiales llegan cuando alguien confunde el dedo de otra persona con postre. Un sospechoso de abuso doméstico intenta escapar de la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un grupo de sospechosos juegan carreras con un vehículo robado. Un borracho tiene un cuchillo y parece que no escuchará las órdenes de los oficiales. Dos sospechosos regresan otra vez a la cárcel por sus problemas con las drogas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospecho de manejar ebrio intenta huir de los oficiales para irse a jugar boliche. Un hombre desnudo se esconde en el porche de una mujer. Una niña de 8 años hace berrinche cuando le prohíben usar Facebook y la policía tiene que intervenir.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamerica (LAS)

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamerica (LAS)

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: La policía detiene a dos jóvenes en la vía pública y a un hombre con una gran cantidad de marihuana. El escuadrón ERUM asiste a un joven que saltó desde un puente y a un oficial herido en un alcoholímetro.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX

programme.title: ¡ALTO! Frontera

programme.title: ¡ALTO! Frontera

programme.title: Cops
